skin.priceHelperFull: Approximate price excluding discounts. Gifted skins are considered purchased, and Exalted skins are considered acquired within the maximum number of attempts (80). Mythic skins and skins with special prices (e.g., Transcendent skins) are not included in the price.

empty.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quaerat, soluta?
empty.search_desc: Your search did not match any skins. Please clear filters to try again.
empty.collection-skins__desc: You haven't mark any skin as owned.

uploadInventory.title: Upload inventory
uploadInventory.description: If you don't want to manually mark every skin as owned, there is an alternative solution — a small script that automatically collects data about your collection from the League of Legends client.
uploadInventory.howItWorks_text: The script connects to the game client via the League Client Update (LCU) API and retrieves the list of all owned skins and chromas. After running, it creates a file with your collection that can be uploaded to the application.
uploadInventory.steps_download_note: Download the archive from the <0>latest release page</0>.
uploadInventory.steps_run_note: Instructions for using the script are on the download page.
uploadInventory.steps_file_note: After the script finishes, a file named inventory.json will appear in the same folder — this is your collection.
uploadInventory.steps_upload: 4. Upload the file to the application
uploadInventory.steps_upload_note: Select inventory.json in the field below and wait for the upload to complete.
uploadInventory.error_upload: Inventory upload failed. Please try again or contact me using one of the links below.
uploadInventory.notes_manual: If for some reason you prefer not to use the script, you can continue marking skins manually.
uploadInventory.notes_safety: The script does not modify game files and does not interact with your Riot account — it only reads local client data.
uploadInventory.help_title: What to do if something went wrong
uploadInventory.help_description: If the script didn't work or you encountered unexpected issues, you can report it:
uploadInventory.help_extra: This will help me assist you and fix possible bugs.

temp.wait_file: Please wait a moment, the file is being prepared for download. This may take some time...

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.error-new-unique: New password cannot be the same as old one
